settings.title: Settings

personalization.textSizeHint: Adjusts the app text size without changing your phone settings

gameMode.title: Free training
gameMode.dualCatchDesc: Original adaptive mode. The Coach continuously adjusts pace and difficulty to keep you in your challenge zone.
gameMode.dualPlaceDesc: After the sequence, place each stimulus at the right moment on the timeline. Sequential memory and ordering are at the heart of this challenge.
gameMode.dualPickDesc: Each stimulus gets a temporal tag (N, N-1, N-2). Assign the right label to position and sound, instead of placing them on the timeline.
gameMode.dualTrackDesc: Attentional tracking: follow multiple moving objects with your eyes and identify the targets.
gameMode.dualTraceDesc: Active trace mode. For each stimulus, trace the path to the N-back position on the grid.
gameMode.dualTimeDesc: Temporal anchoring: slide from A to B aiming for a precise duration, then estimate the elapsed time.
gameMode.corsiBlockDesc: Spatial working memory: memorize and reproduce sequences of increasing length on a 3x3 grid.
gameMode.ospanDesc: Verify math, memorize letters, then recall in order. The gold standard for complex working memory span — storage under cognitive load.
gameMode.runningSpanDesc: Letters stream one at a time; recall the last N when the stream stops unpredictably.
gameMode.pasatDesc: Add each number to the previous one as the pace accelerates. Stresses sustained attention, mental arithmetic, and rapid updating simultaneously.
gameMode.swmDesc: Search boxes to find hidden tokens. Remember where you looked.
gameMode.dualMemoDesc: Active, exhaustive recall: memorize then reproduce every item in the memory window. Difficulty adapts to your results.
gameMode.dualnbackClassicDesc: Jaeggi protocol (2008) reproduction: fixed pace and per-session progression rules. Ideal to compare your results with published studies.
gameMode.brainWorkshopDesc: Replica of the Brain Workshop software, the historical Dual N-Back reference. Same session structure and progression rules.
gameMode.libreDesc: You control all parameters: N-level, trials, active modalities, and pace. Perfect for personalized training.
gameMode.stroopDesc: Name the ink color, ignore the word. Measures interference control — how well you suppress automatic reading.
gameMode.stroopFlexDesc: Follow the current rule: usually answer the ink color, sometimes answer the written word.
gameMode.flankerDesc: Identify the central arrow while ignoring surrounding distractors. The congruency effect reveals your attentional filtering efficiency.
gameMode.goNogoDesc: Tap for green (Go), hold back for red (No-Go). Measures how well you can stop a prepared motor response — a core marker of impulse control.
gameMode.stopSignalDesc: React to Go signals, but cancel when a Stop tone sounds. Estimates your SSRT — the speed at which your brain can brake an ongoing action.
gameMode.antisaccadeDesc: A flash appears on one side — respond on the opposite side. Tests your ability to suppress reflexive orienting, a key executive function.
gameMode.wcstDesc: Sort cards by a hidden rule that changes without warning. Measures cognitive flexibility — can you abandon an old strategy and discover the new one?
gameMode.trailMakingDesc: Connect 1-A-2-B-3-C alternating numbers and letters. The classic clinical measure of cognitive flexibility — your switching cost is the key metric.
gameMode.taskSwitchingDesc: Alternate between two rules on each trial. Measures switch cost.
gameMode.changeDetectionDesc: Brief color arrays flash twice — spot what changed. Estimates Cowan's K, your visual working memory capacity. Most people hold 3-4 items.
gameMode.antDesc: Three attention scores in one test: alerting (readiness), orienting (spatial cueing), and executive control (conflict resolution). Based on Fan et al. 2002.
gameMode.symmetrySpanDesc: Judge symmetry + memorize positions. Visuo-spatial complex span.
gameMode.pvtDesc: Wait for a stimulus at random intervals (2-10s), react instantly. The gold standard for sustained vigilance — even one lapse reveals attentional fatigue.
gameMode.readingSpanDesc: Judge sentence meaning while memorizing the last word of each. Measures verbal working memory — how much you can hold while actively processing.
gameMode.digitSpanDesc: Recall digit sequences forward and backward. Forward measures storage capacity; backward adds manipulation. A foundational working memory benchmark.
gameMode.simonDesc: Respond by color, not position. When the stimulus appears on the wrong side, your brain must override the automatic spatial mapping.
gameMode.posnerCueingDesc: Spatial cueing paradigm. Measures attentional orienting.
gameMode.sternbergDesc: Memory set probe search. Measures scanning speed in WM.
gameMode.axCptDesc: Cue-probe task. Dissociates proactive vs reactive control.
gameMode.mentalRotationDesc: Compare rotated shapes. Spatial visualization task.
gameMode.visualLogicDesc: Complete a 3×3 pattern matrix by finding the missing piece. The classic measure of fluid intelligence — pure reasoning without prior knowledge.
gameMode.visualSearchDesc: Find a target among distractors. Your search slope reveals whether you process the display in parallel (efficient) or serial (effortful).
gameMode.letterNumberDesc: Reorder mixed letters and numbers. WM manipulation task.
gameMode.sartDesc: Tap every digit except 3. The high go-rate (89%) creates a strong response habit, making the rare No-Go a true test of sustained attention.
gameMode.cptDesc: Detect target letter among distractors. Continuous performance test.
gameMode.ufovDesc: Identify central + peripheral targets under brief exposure, with distractors in advanced blocks.
gameMode.gaborDesc: Identify the tilt of briefly shown line patterns. Perceptual detection.
gameMode.palDesc: Memorize shape-location pairs, then recall positions. Paired associate learning.
gameMode.wordListDesc: Study words, then recognize old from new. Verbal episodic memory.
gameMode.patternRecognitionDesc: Memorize visual patterns, then identify old vs new. Visual recognition.
gameMode.bindingDesc: Detect color-shape binding changes after a brief display.
gameMode.promemDesc: Categorize items while remembering to act on special targets.
gameMode.timePromemDesc: Perform a task while pressing a button at regular intervals without a clock.
gameMode.towerDesc: Move discs to match the target configuration in minimum moves.
gameMode.gridlockDesc: Slide vehicles on a 6×6 grid to free the red car. Planning and spatial reasoning.
gameMode.dualMixDesc: Cycle through N-Back, Stroop Flex, and Gridlock each round.
gameMode.mazeDesc: Navigate through mazes from start to goal. Spatial planning.
gameMode.dualTaskDesc: Perform two classification tasks simultaneously. Divided attention.
gameMode.taskJugglingDesc: Monitor multiple counters and reset them at thresholds. Multitasking.
gameMode.wordFlowDesc: Select words belonging to a category as fast as possible.
gameMode.wordChainDesc: Pick the word that starts with the last letter of the previous one.
gameMode.oddOneOutDesc: Spot the different item in a grid of similar shapes. Visual discrimination.
gameMode.numberSeriesDesc: Find the next number in a sequence. Numerical reasoning.
gameMode.analogiesDesc: A is to B as C is to ? Verbal analogical reasoning.
gameMode.timeEstimationDesc: Watch a duration, then reproduce it by holding a button.
gameMode.rhythmDesc: Watch a beat pattern, then reproduce it by tapping.
gameMode.temporalBisectionDesc: Classify durations as short or long relative to learned anchors.
gameMode.tojDesc: Which of two stimuli came first? Fine temporal resolution.
gameMode.predictionMotionDesc: Press when a hidden moving object would reach the target.
gameMode.temporalGeneralizationDesc: Is this duration the same as the reference?
gameMode.durationReproductionDesc: Reproduce a target duration by holding a button.
gameMode.foreperiodDesc: Maintain optimal readiness across unpredictable delays.
gameMode.syncContinuationDesc: Tap with a metronome, then continue without it.
gameMode.iowaGamblingDesc: Learn to avoid risky card decks through trial-and-error.
gameMode.bartDesc: Pump a balloon for reward, but it might pop.
gameMode.delayDiscountingDesc: Choose between a small immediate reward or a larger delayed one.
gameMode.multiArmedBanditDesc: Balance exploring new options vs exploiting the best known.
gameMode.beadsTaskDesc: How much evidence do you need before deciding?
gameMode.contrastSensitivityDesc: Detect gratings at decreasing contrast levels.
gameMode.motionCoherenceDesc: Detect coherent motion direction among noise dots.
gameMode.contourIntegrationDesc: Detect smooth contours among random distractors.
gameMode.crowdingDesc: Identify a target flanked by distractors in peripheral vision.
gameMode.vernierAcuityDesc: Judge sub-pixel spatial offsets between line segments.
gameMode.textureDiscriminationDesc: Discriminate texture element orientation in a masked display.
gameMode.biologicalMotionDesc: Identify human actions from point-light displays.
gameMode.navonDesc: Identify big or small letters in composite hierarchical stimuli.
gameMode.ambiguousFiguresDesc: Switch between percepts in bistable images.
gameMode.attentionalBlinkDesc: Detect two targets in a rapid stream at ~10 items/sec.
gameMode.changeBlindnessDesc: Spot changes between alternating scene versions.
gameMode.dotProbeDesc: Train attention away from threat stimuli.
gameMode.dichoticListeningDesc: Attend to one audio channel, ignore the other.
gameMode.mnemonicDiscriminationDesc: Distinguish old images from highly similar lures.
gameMode.sourceMemoryDesc: Remember not just what but where/who/when.
gameMode.reyFigureDesc: Copy a complex figure, then draw from memory.
gameMode.delayedMatchingDesc: Select a remembered pattern among distractors after a delay.
gameMode.directedForgettingDesc: Intentionally forget some items while remembering others.
gameMode.spacedRetrievalDesc: Recall information at progressively longer intervals.
gameMode.verbalFluencyDesc: Generate words starting with a letter or from a category.
gameMode.designFluencyDesc: Draw unique designs connecting dots under rules.
gameMode.twentyQuestionsDesc: Identify a target using minimal yes/no questions.
gameMode.haylingDesc: Complete sentences with sensible or nonsensical words.
gameMode.brixtonDesc: Predict dot positions following a hidden changing rule.
gameMode.iedSetShiftDesc: Learn to sort by one dimension, then shift.
gameMode.dsstDesc: Match digits to symbols using a reference key — 60 seconds, score = total correct. One of the most sensitive clinical markers of processing speed over time.
gameMode.symbolSearchDesc: Scan symbols and indicate if a target is present.
gameMode.patternComparisonDesc: Are two patterns same or different? Speed test.
gameMode.inspectionTimeDesc: Which line is longer? The display gets shorter as you succeed. Finds your perceptual threshold — the fastest speed at which you can still discriminate.
gameMode.doubleDecisionDesc: Identify central + peripheral targets in brief displays.
gameMode.eyesTest: Reading the Mind in the Eyes
gameMode.eyesTestDesc: Determine mental states from eye-region photos.
gameMode.gazeDirectionDesc: Determine where a face is looking.
gameMode.empathicAccuracyDesc: Rate others' feelings while watching emotional videos.
gameMode.affectiveGoNogoDesc: Respond to one emotional valence, withhold to another.
gameMode.confidenceCalibrationDesc: Rate confidence after each answer, get accuracy feedback.
gameMode.feelingOfKnowingDesc: After recall failure, predict recognition success.
gameMode.remoteAssociatesDesc: Find one word connecting three unrelated words.
gameMode.alternateUsesDesc: List creative uses for a common object.
gameMode.embeddedFiguresDesc: Find a simple shape hidden in a complex figure.
gameMode.paperFoldingDesc: Predict hole patterns after mentally folding paper.
gameMode.mentalCuttingDesc: Determine cross-section shapes of sliced 3D objects.
gameMode.blockDesignDesc: Arrange colored blocks to match a pattern.
gameMode.cognitiveMapDesc: Navigate environments and form mental maps.
gameMode.waterLevelDesc: Draw the correct water line in a tilted container.
gameMode.ansComparisonDesc: Which dot array has more? No counting.
gameMode.subitizingDesc: Rapidly enumerate briefly flashed dot quantities.
gameMode.arithmeticSpeedDesc: Solve falling math problems before they land.
gameMode.numericalStroopDesc: Judge numerical or physical size with conflict.
gameMode.chainCalculationDesc: Sequential mental math with running memory of intermediate results.
gameMode.frequencyDiscriminationDesc: Which tone is higher? Adaptive threshold.
gameMode.gapDetectionDesc: Detect a brief silence in a continuous tone.
gameMode.soundSweepsDesc: Did the frequency sweep go up or down?
gameMode.auditoryFigureGroundDesc: Detect a coherent sound figure in a complex scene.
gameMode.srttDesc: Respond to spatial stimuli hiding an implicit sequence.
gameMode.fingerTappingDesc: Tap sequences as fast and accurately as possible.
gameMode.pursuitTrackingDesc: Follow a moving target with a cursor.
gameMode.mirrorTracingDesc: Trace a shape seeing only its mirror reflection.
gameMode.fittsTappingDesc: Tap between targets of varying width and distance.
gameMode.lexicalDecisionDesc: Real word or nonword? Speed test.
gameMode.anagramDesc: Rearrange scrambled letters to form a word.
gameMode.rapidNamingDesc: Name items in a grid as fast as possible.
gameMode.sentenceVerificationDesc: Judge if sentences are true or false quickly.
gameMode.audiovisualBindingDesc: Judge if audio and visual stimuli are simultaneous.
gameMode.artificialGrammarDesc: Classify strings as grammatical after implicit exposure.
gameMode.contextualCueingDesc: Implicit spatial learning speeds visual search.
gameMode.emotionalGoNogoDesc: Respond to one emotional valence, inhibit another.
gameMode.emotionalStroopDesc: Name ink color of emotional words.
gameMode.trainOfThoughtDesc: Route colored trains to matching stations in real-time.
gameMode.routePlanningDesc: Guide entities to destinations without path overlap.
gameMode.sceneCrasherDesc: Identify which object was added or changed in a scene.
gameMode.speedPackDesc: Visualize how objects fit when a container closes.
gameMode.cambridgeGamblingDesc: Bet on outcomes with known probabilities to measure risk-taking
gameMode.informationSamplingDesc: Reveal tiles to gather evidence before deciding — measures reflection vs impulsivity
gameMode.gameOfDiceDesc: Choose dice combinations with explicit probabilities to measure risky decision-making
gameMode.selfOrderedPointingDesc: Point to a different item each trial without repeating — tests working memory monitoring
gameMode.cancellationDesc: Scan and mark all target items among distractors as fast as possible
gameMode.rvpDesc: Detect target digit sequences in a rapid stream — sustained attention test
gameMode.lineOrientationDesc: Match the angle of line segments to a reference array
gameMode.hooperVisualDesc: Mentally reassemble cut-apart drawings of objects
gameMode.prototypeDistortionDesc: Classify dot patterns as belonging to a category defined by a prototype
gameMode.syllogismsDesc: Evaluate the logical validity of deductive arguments
gameMode.proverbInterpretationDesc: Explain the figurative meaning of proverbs and idioms
gameMode.sentenceCompletionDesc: Complete sentences with contextually appropriate words
gameMode.brownPetersonDesc: Retain information during a distracting counting-backward task
gameMode.judgmentOfRecencyDesc: Determine which of two items appeared more recently
gameMode.negativePrimingDesc: Respond when the previous distractor becomes the target — measures inhibitory control
gameMode.clockDrawingDesc: Draw a clock face from memory with hands set to a specific time
gameMode.sorobanDesc: Mental arithmetic with a Japanese abacus
gameMode.lightsOutDesc: Toggle cells to turn off all lights. Each tap flips adjacent cells too.
gameMode.memoryMatchDesc: Find matching pairs of hidden cards. Classic memory game with increasing grid sizes.
gameMode.chainRecallDesc: Memorize a growing chain of items and recall them in order.
gameMode.reflexDesc: Tap green targets, ignore red lures. Speed and inhibition under pressure.
gameMode.speedSortDesc: Sort cards by changing rules as fast as possible. Cognitive flexibility game.
gameMode.nonogramDesc: Fill a grid using number clues to reveal a hidden picture. Logic deduction puzzle.
gameMode.sokobanDesc: Push boxes onto targets in a confined space. Classic planning puzzle.
gameMode.mirrorDesc: Reproduce a pattern in mirror symmetry. Vertical, horizontal, or central axis.
gameMode.colorRushDesc: Name the ink color under Stroop-like interference. Speed pressure builds.
gameMode.spotDiffDesc: Find differences between two grids before time runs out.
gameMode.tetrisMindDesc: Mentally rotate tetrominoes to fit target holes. Spatial visualization.
gameMode.rhythmTapDesc: Listen to a beat pattern, then reproduce it by tapping. Timing accuracy counts.
gameMode.pipelineDesc: Rotate pipe segments to connect source to drain. Spatial planning puzzle.
gameMode.tangramDesc: Place polyomino pieces to fill a target silhouette. Spatial reasoning.
gameMode.floodDesc: Fill the board with one color by flooding from the top-left corner. Strategic planning.
gameMode.fifteenDesc: Slide numbered tiles to arrange them in order. The classic sliding puzzle.
gameMode.pegsDesc: Jump pegs over each other to remove them all, leaving just one standing.
gameMode.sudokuDesc: Fill the 9×9 grid so every row, column, and 3×3 box contains digits 1–9.
gameMode.twentyFortyEightDesc: Slide and merge numbered tiles to reach 2048. Planning and arithmetic.
gameMode.guessDesc: Guess the hidden color code. Black pegs = right color right place, white = right color wrong place.
gameMode.sameGameDesc: Remove groups of same-colored cells. Bigger groups score more points.
gameMode.untangleDesc: Drag nodes to uncross all edges in a tangled graph.
gameMode.unrulyDesc: Fill a binary grid: no three in a row, equal black and white per line.
gameMode.twiddleDesc: Rotate 2×2 tile groups to arrange numbers in order.
gameMode.mapColoringDesc: Color regions with 4 colors so no two adjacent regions match.
gameMode.towersDesc: Latin square with visibility clues. Fill the grid so each row and column has each digit, matching building visibility from the edges.
gameMode.bridgesDesc: Connect numbered islands with bridges. Each island's number equals its total bridge count.
gameMode.netDesc: Rotate pipe tiles to connect the entire network from a central source.
gameMode.inertiaDesc: Slide across ice to collect all gems without hitting mines.
gameMode.signpostDesc: Number cells 1 to N² following arrow directions to form a continuous path.
gameMode.keenDesc: Latin square with arithmetic cages. Fill so each row and column has each digit, and cages match their target.
gameMode.dominosaDesc: Partition a number grid into dominoes. Each domino value pair appears exactly once.
gameMode.singlesDesc: Black out cells to eliminate duplicate numbers in each row and column.
gameMode.lightUpDesc: Place light bulbs to illuminate every cell. Bulbs must not see each other.
gameMode.tentsDesc: Place tents next to trees. Tents can't touch each other, even diagonally.
gameMode.slantDesc: Fill each cell with a diagonal slash. Clue numbers at intersections show how many diagonals touch.
gameMode.fillingDesc: Fill cells with numbers so connected groups of N cells all contain the digit N.
gameMode.loopyDesc: Draw a single closed loop along cell edges. Numbers show how many edges around that cell are used.
gameMode.pearlDesc: Draw a loop through black and white pearls. Black = turn on pearl, white = go straight through.
gameMode.magnetsDesc: Place magnetic dominoes (+/-) or leave neutral. Row/column clues show pole counts.
gameMode.galaxiesDesc: Divide the grid into regions, each rotationally symmetric around its center dot.
gameMode.rectanglesDesc: Partition the grid into rectangles. Each number equals its rectangle's area.
gameMode.tracksDesc: Lay railway tracks connecting A to B. Row/column numbers show track cell counts.
gameMode.blackBoxDesc: Find hidden balls by firing lasers from the edges and reading their outcomes.
gameMode.undeadDesc: Place ghosts, vampires, and zombies. Clue numbers show how many monsters are visible.
gameMode.mosaicDesc: Fill or empty cells so each clue number matches its neighborhood count.
gameMode.sixteenDesc: Slide entire rows and columns to arrange numbered tiles in order.
gameMode.palisadeDesc: Divide the grid into equal-sized connected regions using border clues.
gameMode.rangeDesc: Place black cells to limit visibility from numbered cells to their exact count.
gameMode.cubePuzzleDesc: Roll a cube over a grid to pick up colored squares. Spatial visualization puzzle.
gameMode.netslideDesc: Slide rows and columns to reconnect a scrambled network to the source.
gameMode.flipDesc: Flip groups of cells to turn them all the same color.
gameMode.testsStableOnlyHint: Tests will appear here when they are available in the stable version.
gameMode.progressHint: The progress bar lets you spot at a glance the modes you've already explored. It fills up over your first 5 sessions.

freeTrainingCards.presetTemplateInfo: You can freely adjust settings. Use “Reset” to go back to the profile.

presets.title: Profiles
presets.help: A profile is a starting point. You can tweak settings freely and reset when needed.
presets.createDesc: Save this mode's current settings to reuse them later.
presets.name: Name

progression.title: Adaptive algorithm
progression.subtitle: Progression strategy
progression.info: The algorithm determines how the level evolves
progression.adaptiveDesc: Trial-by-trial adjustment. Maintains difficulty around d'=1.5 in real-time.
progression.metaLearningDesc: Learns your cognitive profile and adapts its strategy. Experimental.
progression.adaptiveParamsHint: Parameters managed by the algorithm, shown for reference

visual.title: Display
visual.dotsHint: 9 dots reduces flash effect for better visual comfort
visual.colorModalityThemeHint: Palette used when the Color modality is active
visual.colorDisabled: Disabled: Color modality is active (color changes during game)
visual.colorModalityWarning: In color mode, the style will be replaced by a colored square.
visual.layoutSizeHint: Adjust the size of game elements

visualAids.title: Visual aids
visualAids.guidedModeDesc: Shows the last N stimuli below the grid

config.title: Configuration

generatorDescs.random: Simple and direct. Targets and lures are independent.
generatorDescs.brainWorkshop: Brain Workshop algorithm. Targets and lures share the same budget.
generatorDescs.dualnbackClassic: Classic Dual N-Back protocol reproduction (2008). 20 fixed trials.

config.nLevelDesc: Number of turns back to remember. N-2 = remember info from 2 turns ago. Higher N levels increase the difficulty.
config.targetsHint: Matches to find (stimulus = the one from N steps ago)
config.luresHint: Traps: repetition just before target to create confusion
config.adaptiveInfo: Rhythm, targets, and lures are automatically adjusted in real-time based on your performance.
config.stimulusDurationHint: Display time of the square on the grid

modeAvailability.unsupportedTitle: Settings are not wired for this mode yet
modeAvailability.unsupportedBody: You can still select and launch this mode, but the dedicated settings panel is not connected to the registry yet.

generator.title: Timeline and distractors
generator.subtitle: Placement order, timeline, and lure cards

advanced.subtitle: Session formula, variable N, and expert options

audio.title: Audio
audio.binauralHeadphoneNote: Binaural beats require headphones. Wired headphones provide the best experience.
audio.bluetoothWarning: Bluetooth headphones add latency (40-200ms) which may reduce the binaural effect. Prefer wired headphones or a non-binaural preset.
audio.pinkNoiseToast: The subtle background texture is intentional — it helps your brain maintain focus during training.

donation.title: Support Neurodual
donation.subtitle: Help us continue development
donation.description: Neurodual is free and ad-free. If you appreciate the project, you can support us.

pwa.installDescription: Full screen, offline, like a real app
pwa.installDescriptionIOS: On iPhone/iPad: Share → Add to home screen
pwa.updateDescription: Restart to get the latest version

freeMode.title: All features unlocked
freeMode.subtitle: Full free access
freeMode.description: Neurodual is completely free. All levels and features are accessible without restrictions.

premium.title: Go Premium
premium.subtitle: Unlock Neurodual's full potential
premium.freeExplanation: You're using Neurodual for free with full access up to N-3. If you've reached this level, Neurodual works for you. Continue with Premium.
premium.unlockedNow: N-4+ levels, exclusive modes... everything is unlocked!
premium.syncRecommendationDesc: Create an account to save your progress and sync across all your devices.

features.allPlatforms: Access on Android, iOS and web

premium.purchaseSuccessDesc: All premium features are now unlocked.
premium.restoreInfo: Without an account, you can restore your purchase only on devices signed into the same App Store / Google Play account.

legal.linksPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our
legal.autoRenewNoticeIOS: Annual auto-renewable subscription via the App Store. Price and duration are shown above. The subscription renews automatically until canceled. Manage or cancel your subscription in your App Store account settings.
legal.autoRenewNoticeAndroid: Annual auto-renewable subscription via Google Play. Price and duration are shown above. The subscription renews automatically until canceled. Manage or cancel your subscription in your Google Play account settings.
legal.autoRenewNoticeWeb: Annual auto-renewable subscription via web payment. Price and duration are shown above. The subscription renews automatically until canceled. Manage or cancel your subscription from your web payment portal.
legal.oneTimeNoticeIOS: Lifetime offer: one-time payment via the App Store, no automatic renewal.
legal.oneTimeNoticeAndroid: Lifetime offer: one-time payment via Google Play, no automatic renewal.
legal.oneTimeNoticeWeb: Lifetime offer: one-time payment via web payment, no automatic renewal.

premium.mobileOnly: Purchases are only available on mobile
premium.purchaseNotConfigured: Purchase could not be initialized. Restart the app and try again.
premium.purchaseFailed: Purchase failed. Please try again later.
premium.licenseKeyHint: You received your key by email after purchase.

earlyAccess.title: Early access
earlyAccess.description: During beta, your subscription is paused. The countdown will only start when the stable version is released.

data.title: Data
data.shareDesc: Contribute to leaderboards and comparisons (anonymized data)
data.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all data
data.confirmDesc: This action is irreversible. All your history, statistics, and progress will be permanently deleted.
data.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: This action is irreversible. Your account and all data will be permanently deleted. You won't be able to recover your stats or progress.

export.title: Export my data
export.description: Download all your data in JSON format

import.title: Import data
import.description: Restore data from a JSON file

share.title: Share my statistics
share.description: Generate a sharing link for your stats

sync.premiumHint: Upgrade to Premium to sync your data

settings.placementModeDesc: The order in which to place stimuli

experimental.randomFillOrderDesc: Fill slots in a random order (anti-chunking)
experimental.trialColorCodingDesc: Each trial has a distinct color

brainworkshop.modalitiesComboHint: This profile requires exactly {{count}} active modalities.
brainworkshop.combinationGroupHint: Vis & n-vis, Vis & n-audio, and Audio & n-vis always activate together — selecting one enables all three. The Audio modality is added automatically.
brainworkshop.guaranteedMatchHint: Forces a correct match each draw (12.5% by default)
brainworkshop.interferenceHint: Near-miss stimuli to create confusion (12.5% by default)
brainworkshop.variableNBackDesc: N varies during the session using a statistical distribution
brainworkshop.multiStimulusHint: Tip: to get Vis. buttons (G/H/J/K) like Brain Workshop, enable Color or Image in modalities. In multi-stimulus, they will be replaced by Vis. 1–4.
brainworkshop.multiStimulusColorImageWarning: Brain Workshop does not offer multi-stimulus when Color and Image are both enabled.
brainworkshop.selfPacedDesc: Advance manually (Enter) instead of the timer
brainworkshop.sessionDurationAuto: Duration calculated automatically from N level (Brain Workshop protocol).
brainworkshop.multiStimulusArithmeticDisabled: Multi-stimulus disabled: incompatible with arithmetic (BW protocol).
brainworkshop.multiStimulusCombinationDisabled: Multi-stimulus disabled: incompatible with combined modes (BW protocol).
brainworkshop.multiStimulusColorImageDisabled: Multi-stimulus disabled: incompatible with Color + Image together (BW protocol).
brainworkshop.multiAudioArithmeticDisabled: Multi-audio disabled: incompatible with arithmetic (BW protocol).
brainworkshop.multiAudioCombinationDisabled: Multi-audio disabled: incompatible with combined modes (BW protocol).
brainworkshop.arithmeticDifficultyDesc: Choose which operations are allowed in calculations.

dualPick.distractorsDesc: Lure stimuli outside the time window

trace.dynamicRulesDesc: Active modalities vary per trial (cognitive flexibility)
trace.dynamicSwipeDirectionDesc: Swipe direction changes every trial (position only)
trace.writingInputDesc: Auto: keyboard on desktop, handwriting on mobile. Can be changed anytime.
trace.adaptiveTimingDesc: Automatically adjusts difficulty based on performance
trace.arithmeticInterferenceDesc: Mental math between stimulus and response
trace.sequentialTraceDesc: N step-by-step swipes instead of a direct swipe (T→T-N)
trace.mindfulTimingDesc: Require a precise duration for swipes, holds and writing.

tower.groupPuzzlesDesc: Set the tower size and type of challenges for the session.
tower.elementsDesc: Choose the size of the puzzle: 3 for classic, 4 or 5 for harder planning.
tower.sessionVariantDesc: Choose a classic-only block or force memory/precision/expert rounds.

gridlock.groupSessionDesc: Overall session structure: profile, variant, duration and initial preview.
gridlock.profileDesc: Controls the difficulty curve within a session. Rookie stays easy, Standard ramps up, Expert starts hard.
gridlock.sessionVariantDesc: Mixed follows a progressive schedule. Other options force a single challenge type for the whole session.
gridlock.timeLimitDesc: Maximum time to solve each puzzle. Off means no limit.
gridlock.previewDurationDesc: How long the solution is shown before each puzzle.
gridlock.groupDifficultyDesc: Adjust puzzle difficulty and the level of help available during solving.
gridlock.difficultyLockDesc: Force all puzzles to a specific difficulty tier instead of following the profile curve.
gridlock.assistanceDesc: Scales hint, undo and reset budgets. Generous gives 1.5×, Strict gives 0.5×.
gridlock.groupAidsDesc: Choose what information is visible during play and what happens after a failure.
gridlock.showMoveCounterDesc: Display your current move count and budget during play.
gridlock.showOptimalDesc: Display the optimal number of moves for the current puzzle.
gridlock.autoAdvanceDesc: Automatically go to the next puzzle after solving. When off, tap "Next" to proceed.
gridlock.showSolutionDesc: Play the optimal solution when you run out of time or moves.
gridlock.quickAssistanceDesc: Immediately adjusts the amount of help available during solving.
gridlock.quickShowMoveCounterDesc: Shows or hides the move counter during play.
gridlock.quickShowOptimalDesc: Shows or hides the optimal move count for the current puzzle.
gridlock.quickAutoAdvanceDesc: Automatically goes to the next puzzle after solving.
gridlock.quickShowSolutionDesc: Shows the optimal solution after failure or exceeding budget.

ufov.sessionVariantDesc: Which UFOV subtasks to include in the session.
ufov.startSpeedDesc: Initial stimulus display duration in milliseconds.
ufov.peripheralDistanceDesc: How far from center peripheral targets appear.
ufov.distractorsDesc: Number of distractors in the selective attention subtask.

time.estimationDesc: Ask the player to estimate the duration after each slide

corsi.startSpanDesc: Length of the first sequence. Higher values make the session harder from the start.
corsi.directionDesc: Replay the sequence in the same order or in reverse order.
corsi.highlightSpeedDesc: How long each block lights up. Slower is easier for beginners.

pasat.startPaceDesc: Time between numbers at the start. Pace increases with correct answers.

digitSpan.displaySpeedDesc: How long each digit is shown. Slower is easier for beginners.

stroop.responseTimeDesc: Time allowed to respond. Longer is easier for beginners.

flanker.responseTimeDesc: Time allowed to respond. Longer is easier for beginners.

mentalRotation.responseTimeDesc: Time allowed to respond per trial. Longer is easier.

memoryMatch.gridSizeDesc: Number of cards on the board. Larger grids have more pairs to find.
memoryMatch.boardsDesc: Number of boards to complete per session.

lightsOut.gridSizeDesc: Size of the puzzle grid. Larger grids are harder to solve.
lightsOut.puzzlesDesc: Number of puzzles to solve per session.

symmetrySpan.startSetSizeDesc: Number of positions to remember per set at the start.
symmetrySpan.displaySpeedDesc: How long each position is highlighted. Slower is easier for beginners.

tangram.difficultyDesc: Number and complexity of pieces to place.

mirror.axisDesc: Type of mirror symmetry to reproduce.
mirror.patternsDesc: Number of patterns to reproduce per session.

spotDiff.difficultyDesc: Grid size and number of differences to find.

dualTrack.targetsHint: How many balls must be kept in mind. Total balls and session length are then adjusted automatically.
dualTrack.autoCalibration: {{targets}} targets -> {{totalObjects}} balls total, {{trials}} trials, {{trackingSeconds}} s tracking.
dualTrack.identityTrackingDesc: Each target gets its own color during highlight, then you must identify them in that same order after motion.
dualTrack.letterAudioIdentityDesc: Pronounce one Dual N-Back letter per target, one after another, before motion starts. Can be combined with colors.
dualTrack.groupHybridDesc: Choose how many Track and DNB sessions are played before switching phase.
dualTrack.groupLoadDesc: Set the number of targets and density before adjusting motion.
dualTrack.groupModalitiesDesc: Choose the identity cue displayed on each target.
dualTrack.groupMotionDesc: Adjust proximity, speed and trajectory complexity.
dualTrack.focusCrossDesc: An amber crosshair moves in the central area of the arena during tracking to anchor your gaze.
dualTrack.renderModeDesc: Choose between the classic DOM arena and a dedicated WebGL 3D renderer.
dualTrack.renderModeFallback: WebGL is unavailable on this device, so Dual Track falls back to the classic renderer.
dualTrack.depthModeDesc: Add pseudo-3D depth cues to distinguish overlapping balls.
dualTrack.collisionDesc: Balls bounce off each other instead of overlapping.

dyslatéralisation.title: Dyslateralization
dyslatéralisation.optionsNone: Select a mode to see options
dyslatéralisation.mirrorSwipeDesc: Swipe to the horizontal mirror position of the N-back target
dyslatéralisation.stroopMirrorLabelsDesc: Alternates mirrored labels: left buttons on odd trials, right buttons on even trials, center word every other trial.
dyslatéralisation.meskerPrototypeDesc: 3D open board with real-time mirrored tracing.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.hapticUnsupportedDesc: Not supported on this browser/device (e.g. iOS Safari/PWA).
accessibility.sessionRecovery: Offer to resume an interrupted session
accessibility.sessionRecoveryDesc: Shows a prompt after refresh if a session was in progress
accessibility.reminderDesc: Get a local reminder on selected days and time

about.alphaCodeDescription: Enter the code to enable Alpha.
about.appInstalledDesc: Neurodual is on your home screen
about.installDesc: Fullscreen, offline, like a real app

bugReport.title: Report a bug
bugReport.description: Describe the problem you encountered. We'll automatically include technical context.
bugReport.placeholder: What happened? What did you expect?
bugReport.successDesc: Thank you for helping us improve.
bugReport.tooShort: Please describe the issue in more detail
